" We have been providing our Services across the Globe for quite some time now and what we have realised is that any amount is monetary value is not bigger than the Customer Satisfaction for us. We never fail to fill your experience with only Good memories "


- Vikash Mishra

Online Grocery delivery Business All Features

Complete Biz Solution

We do not just provide mobile application or website. We provide full working tested business solution.

Admin Panel

With admin panel you can add/remove product, category, contact option, banners, slots. You can view all orders, users and many more cool things.

App On Google Play Store

We publish your app on google play store. We regularly update your app to meet latest google policies requirment.

Grocery Mobile App

Our Grocery Mobile app is fast reliable. You can add unlimited product, Add unlimited category, Process unlimited orders with our application.

Free Hosting

We provide FREE unlimited hosting space for your application. You can use unlimited bandwidth with our App without speed glitch.

Excellent Support

Our support team is available whenever you need them on calls WhatsApp Email. Not just for app you can reach support for any biz help.

Contact Details

Address:  Kalam Academy 4th Floor Rospa Tower Main Road Ranchi Jharkahnd

Contact Details:  +91-9525395169 / +9162073 36455  

E-Mail:  business@kalamacademy.org

how to start a grocery delivery business in india

It’s very simple to start a mobile grocery store. You just need

  • A Mobile Application

    You can contact us for your grocery mobile app. We build latest tech based high quality super fast app for your grocery business.

  • Tie Up With Local Sellers

    You need to tip up with local seller for products. Like when you get orders you can get products from these sellers. This way you can do your grocery business without huge investment.

  • List Products

    You need to list products that you want to sell on your grocery mobile app. After your tie up with local sellers you can list their products in your mobile application.

Start Your Online Grocery Delivery Business Without Huge Investment

Our expert team will guide you in each and every step. Not only mobile app we provide complete business solution.
